info.title: DATRON next REST API
info.description:
Allows access to data and functions of the DATRON next control and serves the development of individual solutions in the interaction between 3rd party software and the DATRON milling machine. Thus, the DATRON next control provides a programming interface according to a very widespread standard. REST stands for Representational State Transfer.
API stands for Application Programming Interface. The DATRON next REST API is offered in two license variants. Basic version
Enables read access to operating data of the machine. Automation version
Allows you to execute, pause or cancel milling programs. Contains Basic variant.

get.summary: [API Basic] [API Automation] Creates a url where to get the current camera image from the stream with the given id.

503.description: The camera is not configured or the stream with given id is not configured.

get.summary:
[API Basic] Returns the current level of the cartridge
Analog sensor installed: Returns the current fill level (0%-100%) of the cartridge.
Digital sensor installed: Returns 0% if digital sensor is triggered, otherwise 100%
No sensor installed: Always returns 100%
[API Basic] Returns the threshold value from when the "Critical cartridge fill level" dialog is displayed.

post.summary: [API Automation] Function used confirm dialogs using one of the buttons obtained by the OpenDialog function

requestBody.description: Parameters to tell next software which interaction to perform on the dialog

get.summary: [API Basic] Returns the currently opened dialog, if one exists. Depending on the type of dialog some fields of the response might be empty or not present!

post.summary: [API Automation] Aborts the current execution
[API Automation] Executes Lines containing Program calls, programs must be avaiable in Module Base
[API Automation] Executes the currently loaded SimPL program.
[API Automation] Executes a program. Compare the path format in the SimPL-Reference for loading modules.

[API Automation] Executes a program in an asynchronous way. Compare the path format in the SimPL-Reference for loading modules. The call returns immediately after loading the program. The return value indicates whether the loading worked.

[API Automation] Executes a program only if the checksum given matches the current checksum. For more details see ProgramFileInfo request. For more informations about the path-format look in the SimPL-Reference regarding "loading modules".

404.description: There is not program matching the path.

400.description: The path is bad formatted OR the hashsum is invalid. Please see also ProgramFileInfo to inspect the hash state.

post.summary: [API Automation] Loads a program. Compare the path format in the SimPL-Reference for loading modules.
[API Automation] Moves the spindle into the park position
[API Automation] Pauses the current execution

get.summary: [API Automation] Returns informations about a program. Compare the path format in the SimPL-Reference for loading modules.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Compare the path format in the SimPL-Reference for loading modules.

404.description: There is not program matching the path.

post.summary:
[API Automation] Refreshes the user defined library folder. Caution: if there is any file which is not usable, all files get removed.
This method does not return whether the operation was successful or not.
[API Automation] Resumes the current execution

get.summary: [API Automation] Enumerates the contents of a given Path

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The directory, whose path will be enumerated in SimPL Syntax (i.e. machine:folder/subfolder)

post.summary: [API Automation] Allows to upload media files such as images to save to the drive. All files have be provided as a base64 string.
[API Automation] Allows uploading of files.

get.summary: [Public] Returns the Image of the Camera. The stream id is encoded in the given token.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: You can get a token by invoking url generation i.e. [Get] /api/Camera/CreateCameraImageUrl

400.description: Task cannot be completed with the id provided.

get.summary: [Public] Returns the machine image
[Public] Queries the simulated preview image of the currently loaded program

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: one can get a token by invoking program preview image request i.e. [Get] /api/Runtime/PreviewImage

get.summary: [Public] Queries the image of a tool

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: one can get a token by invoking toolrequests i.e. [Get] /api/Tool/ToolInSpindle

parameters.name: upRight
parameters.description: true: tool is shown vertically with tip to top. false: tool is shown horicontally with tip to the left.

parameters.name: mirrored
parameters.description: mirrors the tool (tip to the bottom or to the right)

get.summary: [Public] Returns a descirption regarding activated license options.
[Public] Returns the unique machine number.
[API Basic] [API Automation] Gets the status of program execution
[Public] Returns the machine type.
[API Basic] [API Automation] Returns the software version of the next control.
[Public] Especially useful for testing the connection to the machine.

post.summary: [API Automation] Starts homing if not already referenced.

[API Basic] [API Automation] Queries sensors regarding compressed air

[API Basic] [API Automation] Returns runtime informations
[API Basic] [API Automation] Queries sensors regarding spray system
[API Basic] [API Automation] Gets the RGB status light

post.summary: [API Automation] Executes a program. Compare the path format in the SimPL-Reference for loading modules.

get.summary: [API Automation] Returns values for the remote link app

[API Basic] [API Automation] Query of the tools in the embedded tool changer.
[API Basic] [API Automation] Queries the tools that could be used at some point in the currently loaded program
[API Basic] [API Automation] Query of the tools in the ToolAssist.
[API Basic] [API Automation] Query of the tools in the warehouse

post.summary: [Public] Create an accesstoken (bearer authentication)

get.summary: [Public] Returns permissions granted by given claim
[API Automation] Fetches the value of the boolean variable with the given name from the database.

post.summary:
[API Automation] Writes the given value to the database under the given name as type boolean.
If a boolean variable already exists under the name, the value is overwritten.
Otherwise, a new entry is created.

get.summary: [API Automation] Fetches the value of the number variable with the given name from the database.

post.summary:
[API Automation] Writes the given value to the database under the given name as type number.
If a number variable already exists under the name, the value is overwritten.
Otherwise, a new entry is created.

get.summary: [API Automation] Fetches the value of the string variable with the given name from the database.

post.summary:
[API Automation] Writes the given value to the database under the given name as type string.
If a string variable already exists under the name, the value is overwritten.
Otherwise, a new entry is created.
[API Automation] Activates the workpiece

get.summary: [API Basic] [API Automation] Returns all saved workpieces

post.summary: [API Automation] Updates the image of the workpiece
[API Automation] Updates the workpiece

get.summary: [API Basic] [API Automation] Returns the picture of the workpiece

logical.description: logical level. Status is in some specified range.

name.description: Name of the variable. Name is validated according to the simpl variable naming rules.

imageUrl.description: Base image url to request a camera image

CameraImageUrl.description: Represents a url to query the current camera image

compressedAirSoftwareMonitorEnabled.description: is true if the software is monitoring the compressed air sensors

id.description: Unique ID of this dialog required to control it in a later request

caption.description: Caption at the top of the dialog

text.description: Main text describing what the dialog is about. Might not be present for every dialog type

details.description: Additional information to the main Text. Might not be present for every dialog type

leftButtons.description: Buttons on the bottom left side of the dialog box

rightButtons.description: Buttons on the bottom right side of the dialog box

Dialog.description: Represents a Dialog opened in the User Interface on the Machine

id.description: The Id of the previously obtained dialog

button.description: The button that is supposed to be pressed to confirm the dialog

DialogConfirmParameters.description: Parameters required to confirm a dialog previously obtained with one of the get functions

lines.description: program lines, separated by newline characters

ExecuteLinesParameters.description: Valid SimPL program calls, programs must be available in simpl module Base

programExecutionTime.description: the time that the program is already running

programmLeftTime.description: The time that the program is expected to take

cuttingOverride.description: The override applied to cutting type commands

positioningOverride.description: The override applied to positioning type commands

FeedOverride.description: The current overrides applied by the hand control unit

files.description: All files contained in the given directory

subfolders.description: All folders contained in the given directory

FolderContentNames.description: Shows what is inside a folder requested through the API

GeometricalAttribute.description: Describes an aspect of the geometric nature of a tool

GeometricalProperty.description: Represents an geometrical aspect of the tool

name.description: Name of the variable. Name is validated according to the simpl variable naming rules.

PreparationDataError.description: Data structure for errors that can occur during import into the preparation list

PreparationSuccessResult.description: Data structure for successful import into the preparation list

latestChangeTime.description: Zeitpunkt der letzten Änderung des Programms

expectedExecutionDuration.description:
Aus einer Simulation berechnete Dauer für die Programmausführung
Wenn das Programm  noch nie simuliert wurde, null

hasValidToolCheckAnalysis.description: True, wenn nach der letzten Änderung des Programms eine ToolcheckAnalyse durchgeführt wurde,

path.description:
The path referencing the program to execute.
I.E. machine:program.simpl, device:DEVICENAME\program.simpl

name.description: the name of the rule. Some arbitrary string.

StatusLight.description: Represents the status LED color of the machine.

name.description: Name of the variable. Name is validated according to the simpl variable naming rules.

placeNumber.description: Place number in the assigned changer (Tool)

imageUrl.description: Base image url to request a preview image (Tool)

Tool.description: Represents a aggregation of Tool and ToolTyp data.

path.description: The location that the file will be written to in SimPL Syntax (i.e. machine:folder/file.simpl)

base64Content.description: The content written to the file. Has to be encoded in Base64 format

UploadBinaryFileParameters.description: Parameters to upload a file to be stored on the filesystem

path.description: The location that the file will be written to in SimPL Syntax (i.e. machine:folder/file.simpl)

content.description:
The content written to the file.
Quotation marks have to be escaped using the '\' character to make the json serialization possible.

UploadTextFileParameters.description: Parameters to upload a file to be stored on the filesystem

path.description:
The path referencing the program to execute.
I.E. machine:program.simpl, device:DEVICENAME\program.simpl

checksum.description: MD5 checksum as hex or base64 encoded string. See the results from GetProgramFileInfo.

name.description: The name of the coordinate system
The name of the coordinate system

Bearer.description:
JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. 
Scheme: "Bearer {token}".
To request a new token, use the POST:/api/User/CreateToken. Replace {token} with the received token and remove the brackets. 
Make sure you put the word "Bearer " in front of it. 

 (Important: whitespace between Bearer and {token})
Bearer.name: Authorization
